claims.claim: Pipecat VAD defaults: VAD_START_SECS=0.2, VAD_STOP_SECS=0.2, confidence=0.7, min_volume=0.6 at vad_analyzer.py:24-27
STT safety net waits max(0, stt_p99 - stop_secs); warns if stop_secs != 0.2 (built-in p99 assumes 0.2) and if stop_secs >= stt_p99 (wait collapses to 0)
claims.found: L201: timeout = max(0, self._stt_timeout - self._stop_secs); L204 warns if stop_secs != VAD_STOP_SECS ('Built-in p99 latency values assume stop_secs=...'); L214 warns if stop_secs >= stt_timeout ('STT wait timeout collapsed to 0s'). L140: self._stt_timeout = frame.ttfs_p99_latency
L338-342: min_endpointing_delay=(min_endpointing_delay if is_given(...) else 0.5), max_endpointing_delay=(... else 3.0)

claims.found: Consistent with the STT-final dependency mechanism verified locally in the same strategy (turn stop requires a transcript, _stt_timeout keyed to ttfs_p99). Mechanism claim not over-asserted; deferred detail lives in TURN-06.
